title: Increasing Sequence
description: You are given a permutation of size $N$. For each $i$, print the number of indices $j \neq i$, which when removed, decreases the maximum possible length of an increasing subsequence that contains index $i$.
input:
The first line contains an integer $N$.

The next line contains $N$ integers $A_1, A_2, \cdots, A_N$.
output: Print $N$ integers, separated by spaces, denoting the answers for $i = 1, 2, 3, \cdots, N$.
source: University, KAIST, KAIST RUN Spring Contest, 2019 KAIST RUN Spring Contest, Contest, Open Cup, 2018/2019 Season, Stage 19: Grand Prix of Daejeon, koosaga
